_comment: Per-project MCP server config. Both `playwright` and `chrome-devtools` MCPs are auto-discovered by Claude Code from its global config and we keep them registered here for hosts that DO have a usable system Chromium. They will fail to launch on any host where libnspr4/libnss3/libasound2 are not installed (e.g. this WSL2 sandbox without sudo) — in that case use `bash scripts/validate-browser.sh` as the offline fallback. The script ships its own LD_LIBRARY_PATH workaround and a one-time playwright-core fetch, and writes screenshots/live-landing.png with the same headless Chromium binary the MCPs would use.
